---
title: "Campaign Spotlight: Inspiring Future Engineers"
date: 2025-12-19
description: "How campaign activities helped students discover engineering pathways."
image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529078155058-5d716f45d604?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
categories: [Campaign, Youth]
---

MEJC campaigns combine practical storytelling and mentorship touchpoints that help high school and university students explore engineering with clarity.
